name: FRPerfKit
summary: A lightweight SwiftUI performance toolkit (FPS / CPU / memory / GPU / launch / hang) with an in-app overlay.
description:
FRPerfKit displays real-time performance metrics — FPS, CPU, memory,
GPU, cold launch time, and main thread hangs — as a draggable in-app
overlay during DEBUG builds. Sessions are persisted to disk and can
be exported as JSON or CSV for cross-run comparison.

All collectors and overlay UI are stripped from Release builds via
`#if DEBUG`, leaving a zero-overhead passthrough.
